steps.t: Hadorion has asked you to search the body and see if you can find what he could not.
You found traces of a green ichor on the victim's clothes. You should report to Hadorion. Hadorion can be found in Barad Faen.
Hadorion has asked you to question the townsfolk of Barad Faen for more information on the mysterious ichor.
The concerned merchant has told you the substance is foreign. You should question more townsfolk to see if they have noticed anything suspicious come …
The woman has told you of someone new to town that seems distressed. You should search for them.
The man has told you that his waggon was hijacked before arriving in Barad Faen and abandoned along the western exit of Barad Faen.
You found a shard of glass stained with the foul smelling ichor. You should return to Hadorion. Hadorion can be found in Barad Faen.
Hadorion wishes to speak to you in private, follow him into his hearth.
